USA Badminton Junior Player Game Stats

2025-2026 Season — Top 300 per discipline — Updated March 6, 2026

Ranking | Column Legend

Column Legend

ColumnDescription
Basic Info
#Rank by total rally points scored across all games
PlayerPlayer name (stats combined across all age groups within the selected discipline)
TTournaments played: number of distinct tournaments the player competed in
Match Record
MMatches: total matches played (wins + losses)
WWins: total matches won
LLosses: total matches lost
W%Win percentage: match win rate (wins ÷ matches × 100)
Game Record
GPGames played: total individual games played. Each match is best-of-3 games (2 or 3 games per match)
GWGames won: individual games won (each game is played to 21 points)
GLGames lost: individual games lost
G%Game win percentage: game win rate (games won ÷ games played × 100)
Rally Points
PtsPoints scored: total rally points scored across all games in the season
AgstPoints against: total rally points conceded to opponents
DiffPoint differential: points scored minus points conceded. Green = positive, red = negative
P/MPoints per match: average rally points scored per match
P/GPoints per game: average rally points scored per game (theoretical max around 21)
3-Game Matches (Deciding Game)
3GM3-game matches: number of matches that went to a deciding 3rd game
3GW3-game wins: matches won after going to a 3rd game (clutch wins)
3GL3-game losses: matches lost after going to a 3rd game
3G%3-game percentage: what % of all matches went to a deciding 3rd game
Dominance
SSWStraight-set wins: matches won 2-0 without dropping a game
SSLStraight-set losses: matches lost 0-2 without winning a game
BWMBiggest win margin: largest total rally point differential in a single match win
BLMBiggest loss margin: largest total rally point differential in a single match loss
